page_metadata.biotools__summary: QuASeR is a quantum accelerated de novo DNA sequence reconstruction. It is a reference-free DNA sequence reconstruction implementation via de novo assembly on both gate-based and quantum annealing platforms.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: QuASeR is a quantum accelerated de novo DNA sequence reconstruction. It is a reference-free DNA sequence reconstruction implementation via de novo assembly on both gate-based and quantum annealing platforms.
